---
title: "LRPGF05: Gain factors for phonetic spelling (P), off-floor"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8).
:::

::: {.callout-warning title="Warning: Preliminary model output"}

This model output is preliminary and likely to change as the model evolves and further data are received.

If the model was not fitted in "reporting" mode, the results will be more approximate than where additional sampling has been performed.

:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd

_here = Path(".")
with open(_here / "config.json") as f:
    config = json.load(f)
factor_summary = pd.read_csv(_here / "factor_summary.csv")
treatment_marginal = pd.read_csv(_here / "treatment_marginal.csv")
```

## Overview

LRPGF05 is the **gain-factors** model for phonetic spelling (`spphon`).

::: {.callout-important title="Floored outcome - off-floor likelihood"}

Phonetic spelling is **heavily floored** (most period post-scores are zero), so a
graded Beta-Binomial gain would be driven by a few dispersed tail values rather
than the factor contrasts. Following the suite's floor rule, the likelihood is a
**Bernoulli on the binary off-floor indicator** (period post $> 0$): the linear
predictor models the **log-odds of coming off the floor**. `beta_trt` is the
off-floor log-odds of being on intervention, and its items-scale marginal collapses
to the **off-floor risk difference**.

:::

::: {.callout-important title="Causal labelling (DAG guardrails)"}

Only the randomised on-intervention term is causal (period-1 contrast). Own
baseline, age, ability (blocks) and the upstream skills letter sounds (L) and
blending (B) are **adjusted associations** confounded by latent general ability
(child random intercept repairs the time-invariant part) - "associated with",
never "drives". Sessions/dose are never conditioned on (collider); SES is excluded
(non-DAG / redundant).

:::

## Model

$$
(P_{\text{post}} > 0) \sim \operatorname{Bernoulli}(\operatorname{expit}(\eta)),\quad
\eta = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{period}} + \beta_{\text{trt}}\text{OnIntervention}
  + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(P_{\text{pre}}) + \gamma_A A_{\text{std}}
  + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{s\in\{L,B\}}\gamma_s\operatorname{logit}_*(s_{\text{pre}})
  + \textstyle\sum\text{interactions} + u_{\text{child}}.
$$

No Beta-Binomial concentration (`kappa`) under the off-floor Bernoulli. Priors
follow the shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

## Priors

![alpha](prior_alpha.svg){width=24%}
![tau (treatment)](prior_tau.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_own](prior_gamma_own.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_age](prior_gamma_age.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_cross](prior_gamma_cross.svg){width=24%}

## Prior-predictive check

![Prior predictive](prior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Sampling diagnostics

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = pd.read_csv(_here / "diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag
```

![Trace](trace_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Energy](energy_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Posterior](posterior_plot.png){.lightbox}

## Posterior-predictive check

![Posterior predictive](posterior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Findings

### Factor summary (off-floor log-odds)

```{python}
# | echo: false
factor_summary
```

`role` flags the on-intervention term **causal**, all else **association**. Coefficients are off-floor log-odds; `mean`/`lo`/`hi` = posterior mean + equal-tailed 95% CrI; `prob_positive` = $P(\text{coef} > 0)$.

### Off-floor risk difference (treatment)

```{python}
# | echo: false
treatment_marginal
```

For the off-floor model the `trt_prob_*` / `trt_items_*` rows are the **off-floor risk difference** of being on intervention (the items scale collapses to the probability scale; `n_trials = 1`).

## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
```

## Configuration

```{python}
# | echo: false
config
```
